channel.title: Sony on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Sony on MinWeb

item.title: Sony Increases PS5 and Pro Prices: What You Need to Know
item.description: Sony has announced significant price hikes across its entire PlayStation 5 lineup; find out what these increases mean for gamers and why costs are rising.

item.title: Spider-Man: New Trailer Secrets
item.description: Dive into our scene-by-scene breakdown of the Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer to uncover hidden secrets, plot clues, and what Peter Parker's future holds.
